hyperedges.label: RAG retrieval pipeline (embed → vectorSearch → fetchChunks → buildRagContext)
Cross-user isolation invariant — server-derived profileOwnerId pinned at every read boundary
Streaming-lock lifecycle (sendMessage/retryMessage acquire → streamResponse uses → clearStreamingLock CAS-releases in finally)

nodes.label: System prompt 6000-char budget with proportional truncation
nodes.norm_label: system prompt 6000-char budget with proportional truncation

nodes.norm_label: safefetch is not dns-rebinding resistant; accepted personal-blog risk (nfr-01)

nodes.norm_label: schema lives in separate file so orphan-sweep introspection test does not enumerate ownership.storageid as a live reference

nodes.label: FG_091: ownership pair closes cross-user storage-deletion attack (user B copying A's storageId into B's body)
nodes.norm_label: fg_091: ownership pair closes cross-user storage-deletion attack (user b copying a's storageid into b's body)

nodes.label: Backfill original slugs only live in mutation return; capture stdout to a log file is mandatory

nodes.label: Href builder must stay aligned with apps/mirror dynamic route — single source of truth
nodes.norm_label: href builder must stay aligned with apps/mirror dynamic route — single source of truth

nodes.norm_label: importmarkdowninlineimagescore (fg_095 shared core, fg_096 srcmap merge)
